home.intro: Every mapped place below is sourced live from OpenStreetMap. Click any point to see details, photos and descriptions.
home.howSub: Three steps from idle scrolling to your next trip.
home.step1Body: Pan and zoom the live map, or search by name and country to find {noun} anywhere in the world.
home.step2Body: Click any point for photos, descriptions, opening hours and what's nearby — all in one place.
home.step3Body: Found somewhere you love? Jump straight to tours, tickets and experiences for it.
home.metaDescription: Explore {total, number} {noun} across {countries, number} countries on an interactive map. Find {noun} near you with photos, details and travel guides.

country.heading: {noun} in {country}
country.intro: Explore every mapped place in {country}, sourced from OpenStreetMap.
country.moreNote: Showing the first {shown, number} of {total, number}. Open the interactive map to explore them all.

blog.heading: Blog
blog.authorBio: Independent developer based in Sweden — building interactive maps out of a passion for travel and open data.
blog.exploreHeading: Explore the countries in this guide

about.heading: About
about.contributeBody: This map is only as complete as OpenStreetMap itself. If you know a {noun} that isn't here, you can add it directly to OpenStreetMap — it's free, open and will appear here at the next refresh.
about.contributeCta: Add a missing place on OpenStreetMap →
about.reportHeading: Report an error or a wrong location
about.reportBody: Found a {noun} in the wrong spot, with outdated details, or listed twice? The data lives in OpenStreetMap, so the quickest fix is a short note there — a local mapper reviews it and the correction flows back to this map at the next refresh.
about.contactBody: Questions, feedback, or a partnership idea? We'd love to hear from you — reach us at
about.faqBody: Quick answers to the most common questions are on our
about.builtByBody: {name} is built and maintained by {author}, an independent developer based in Sweden. The site grew out of a passion for maps, travel and open data, alongside a professional background in IT consulting.

footer.tagline: An open world map, powered by OpenStreetMap.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.

signup.heading: Get monthly travel inspiration

signup.thanks: Thanks! Your email app will open to confirm.
signup.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.gdpr: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

cookie.message: We use optional cookies to measure traffic anonymously.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Common questions about this map and the {noun} on it.
faq.a1: {name} is a free, interactive world map of every {noun}, built entirely from open OpenStreetMap data. Click any point for a photo, a description and the key facts.
faq.q2: Where does the data come from?
faq.a2: Every location is sourced from OpenStreetMap, the free, community-maintained map of the world. Photos and descriptions come from Wikipedia, Wikimedia Commons and Mapillary.
faq.q3: How often is the map updated?
faq.a3: The dataset is refreshed automatically from OpenStreetMap about once a month, so newly added or edited {noun} show up without any manual work.
faq.a4: Yes. The map is completely free to browse, and the underlying data is open under the Open Database License (ODbL).
faq.q5: How do I find a specific place?
faq.a5: Open the map and use the search box to filter by name or country, or browse by country from the home page.
faq.q6: A {noun} is missing — can I add it?
faq.a6: Absolutely, and we'd love you to. Add it directly to OpenStreetMap — it's free and open — and it will appear here at the next monthly refresh.
faq.q7: Something is wrong or in the wrong place. How do I report it?
faq.a7: Because the data lives in OpenStreetMap, the quickest fix is a short note there. A local mapper reviews it and the correction flows back to this map automatically.
faq.q8: Can I use the data for my own project?
faq.a8: Yes, under the OpenStreetMap ODbL license — just credit "OpenStreetMap contributors". Photos and text keep their original Wikipedia and Wikimedia licenses.
faq.q9: Why don't some places have a photo or description?
faq.a9: We only show a photo or description when one is available from Wikipedia, Wikimedia Commons or Mapillary. Many {noun} simply haven't been documented there yet.
faq.q10: How can I get in touch?
faq.a10: Use the contact link in the footer or on the About page — we're always glad to hear feedback, corrections and ideas.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: {name} respects your privacy. This page explains what data is processed when you use the site, and what your rights are.
privacy.collectBody: The site has no user accounts and no forms that store data on our servers. The only usage data we collect is anonymised statistics via Google Analytics 4 (with IP anonymisation, no advertising features) — and only after you have accepted analytics in the cookie banner.
privacy.cookiesBody: Google Analytics sets cookies only after you give consent via the cookie banner. Your consent choice itself is stored in your browser's localStorage and never leaves your device.
privacy.thirdBody: Some content is loaded from third parties when you use the site. These services receive your IP address as part of a normal web request:
privacy.thirdAnalytics: Google Analytics 4 — anonymised visitor statistics (only after consent).
privacy.thirdWiki: Wikipedia and Wikimedia Commons — place descriptions and photos, loaded when you open a place.
privacy.thirdOsm: OpenStreetMap — map tiles and the underlying place data.
privacy.rightsBody: Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation you have the right to:
privacy.rightsAccess: request access to your personal data;
privacy.rightsComplaint: lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacy.contactBody: Questions about privacy? Email us at

terms.heading: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using {name} you agree to these terms.
terms.asIsBody: The site is provided free of charge, “as is” and “as available”, without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We may change or discontinue any part of the service at any time.
terms.dataBody: Map data comes from OpenStreetMap (Open Database License); descriptions and images come from Wikipedia and Wikimedia Commons (Creative Commons licences). Licences:
terms.accuracyBody: Locations, positions and other place information are community-maintained and can be incomplete, outdated or wrong. Always verify critical details (access, safety, opening hours) with official sources before you travel.
terms.liabilityBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we accept no liability for any loss or damage arising from your use of the site or from reliance on the information it presents.
terms.contactBody: Questions about these terms? Email us at

affiliate.heading: Affiliate Disclosure
affiliate.p1: {name} contains affiliate links — for example links to booking and experience partners shown next to places on the map.
affiliate.p2: If you book or buy something through one of these links, we may earn a small commission. This never costs you anything extra — the price is the same as if you had gone to the partner directly.
affiliate.p3: Affiliate partnerships do not influence which places appear on the map or how they are presented. The map data comes from OpenStreetMap and is independent of any partner.
affiliate.contactBody: Questions about this disclosure? Email us at

cookiePolicy.heading: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This page explains what {name} stores in your browser and how you can change your choice.
cookiePolicy.whichAnalytics: Google Analytics 4 cookies (_ga and similar) — anonymised usage statistics. Set only after you accept analytics in the cookie banner.
cookiePolicy.whichConsent: A localStorage entry that remembers your cookie-banner choice. It stays on your device and is not a tracking cookie.
cookiePolicy.changeBody: To withdraw or change your consent, clear this site's browsing data (cookies and site data) in your browser — the consent banner will appear again on your next visit. You can also block cookies entirely in your browser settings.
cookiePolicy.contactBody: Questions about cookies? Email us at
